title: Shapeshifter chooses a battle form before hit roll

card.rawText: Prior to battle, choose 1 of the forms below for this battle. Eagle: +5 SPD. Deer: +3 Modifier. Bear: +4 Atk Dice Rolls. Turtle: +6 AL.

effect.value: Prior to battle, choose 1 of the forms below for this battle. Eagle: +5 SPD. Deer: +3 Modifier. Bear: +4 Atk Dice Rolls. Turtle: +6 AL.

plan.title: Shapeshifter chooses a battle form before hit roll
plan.summary: Before battle, choose one Shapeshifter form and verify the selected battle-only modifier is represented.

notes: Read text first: Prior to battle, choose 1 of the forms below for this battle. Eagle: +5 SPD. Deer: +3 Modifier. Bear: +4 Atk Dice Rolls. Turtle: +6 AL.
